---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: Projects
  type: grid
  sort-ui: true         
  filter-ui: true     
  grid-columns: 3      
  categories: true  
  grid-item-align: center 
  image-height: "250px" 
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories]
toc: false
page-layout: full

---

## Curated gallery of my most recent quanitative data visualization projects, featuring my use of Shiny and Tableau.
